title: Conversational lead intake and persistent Max
originalPrompt: Replace the manual CRM-style New Lead form with one LLM-style free-form data-dump intake that preserves the raw submission, extracts whatever seller/property/contact/source clues are available without fabrication, creates a Lead Card even when fields are incomplete, and automatically begins research. Make the chief-of-staff assistant globally present on every LandOS page with immediate text and voice input, rename the operator-facing assistant from Jarvis to Max, preserve owner-only outbound and all Phase 1 safety boundaries, and verify the visible localhost experience.

workstreams.name: One-box conversational manual lead intake
workstreams.operatorOutcome: The owner can paste or dictate one unstructured data dump, submit it once, and immediately receive a Lead Card whose extracted clues and unknowns are visible while research starts automatically.
workstreams.requiredDataState: Raw input is preserved exactly; extracted items remain seller-supplied or needs-verification; incomplete input still creates an honest Lead Card.

steps: Paste one mixed seller/property data dump
Confirm extracted clues and queued/running research are visible

failureConditions: seller name or parcel clue blocks creation

requirements.text: New Lead presents one prominent free-form text area with optional microphone input and no required individual CRM fields.
A non-empty data dump always creates a durable Lead Card while preserving the exact raw input and provenance.
LandOS extracts only defensible seller, contact, source, and property clues; absent or uncertain values remain unknown or needs verification.
Lead creation immediately queues the durable property research mission and opens the resulting Lead Workspace.

workstreams.name: Persistent Max chief-of-staff surface
workstreams.operatorOutcome: Max is visibly present on every LandOS page with immediate text and microphone controls, receives replies without navigating away, and replaces Jarvis in operator-facing language.
workstreams.requiredDataState: Existing conversations and internal compatibility identifiers remain usable; no seller or external outbound capability is added.

steps: Confirm response appears without opening a separate page

failureConditions: Max requires navigating to a separate page
operator UI still calls the chief of staff Jarvis

requirements.text: A persistent Max assistant dock renders in the global application shell on every primary LandOS route.
The dock supports immediate text submission and browser speech-to-text without requiring navigation to the conversation page.
Max replies and progress are visible globally through the existing chat stream and survive route changes.
Operator-facing chief-of-staff labels use Max while compatibility identifiers may remain internal.
Owner-only outbound, no paid action, and no offer or contract sending rules remain enforced.
